CMAKE_VERSION.description: Specific version of cmake to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

CMAKE_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install CMAKE. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

CMAKE_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for CMAKE to listen on

CMAKE_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for CMAKE to listen on

CMAKE_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for CMAKE to listen on
